parsed_output.justification: Alana claims to be the Troublemaker and states, 'you didn't wake up as the Insomniac because I switched you,' and later, 'I know because I switched you.' According to the game rules, the Troublemaker swaps the cards of two other players without looking at them, meaning Alana could not possibly know Mike's starting role. This structural lie, combined with her subsequent comment 'I just fell into a trap' after Mike's contradictory claims, strongly indicates she is the Werewolf attempting to deceive the group.

This structural lie, combined with her subsequent comment 'I just fell into a trap' after Mike's contradictory claims, strongly indicates she is the Werewolf attempting to deceive the group.
